title: 👨‍🍳 Join a Premium Private Club Kitchen Chinese & Western Cuisine | OT Pay | AWS + Bonus
description:
📍 Location: Sime Road area, Singapore
🚌 Daily transport provided from nearby MRT station

Work in a well-established private club kitchen known for high food standards, structured operations, and a professional team environment. This role offers stable employment and long-term career opportunity in a quality dining setting.

👨‍🍳 Job Responsibilities

  • Prepare Chinese and Western dishes in a professional kitchen
  • Perform food preparation such as chopping, slicing, and portioning ingredients
  • Cook and plate dishes according to recipes and standard procedures
  • Conduct stocktaking and assist with ordering kitchen supplies
  • Receive and store deliveries with proper stock rotation
  • Maintain cleanliness, hygiene, and organisation of kitchen workstations
  • Minimise food wastage and support cost-control practices
  • Handle kitchen equipment safely
  • Follow food safety and workplace safety regulations
  • Support events and perform ad-hoc kitchen duties when required
  • Work closely with team members to ensure smooth kitchen operations

✅ Requirements

  • Experience in kitchen operations or food preparation is an advantage
  • Willing to learn with a positive work attitude
  • Able to work in a fast-paced environment
  • Good teamwork and attention to detail
  • Passion for culinary work
  • Able to commit to a 6-day work week, including weekends and public holidays
  • Willing to work rotating shifts

⏰ Working Hours

6 days per week
Operating hours between 7:00 AM – 9:00 PM (shift-based)

💰 Salary & Benefits

  • Monthly Gross Salary: SGD $2,500 – $2,800 (inclusive of overtime where applicable)
  • Overtime pay according to regulations
  • Annual Wage Supplement (AWS)
  • Performance-based bonus
  • Daily transport provided
  • Stable and structured work environment

EA Personnel Name: Jabez Wong
EA Personnel No: R1762582
EA License No: 23C1703

postedCompany.description: WOLA Recruitment Pte Ltd is a leading human resources and recruitment agency dedicated to connecting businesses with top-tier talent. Established with a commitment to excellence and professionalism, WOLA Recruitment specializes in providing comprehensive staffing solutions to companies across various industries. With a team of experienced professionals and a deep understanding of the job market, we are dedicated to helping our clients achieve their business goals by finding the right people for the right positions.
postedCompany.name: WOLA RECRUITMENT PTE. LTD.

hiringCompany.description:
With our storied history and rich heritage, Keppel Club has not only been the destination for golf enthusiasts, but it is also a place for their families to call home since 1904. As Singapore’s oldest club in its original location, we have four generations of members walk through our club’s doors experiencing what we have to offer. We are home to a range of dining outlets offering sumptuous food to our members and guests taking them on a gastronomical journey that will keep you coming back for more. We promise our members and their guests a wonderful experience in an idyllic and natural environment that is cosy, friendly and fun.


Work Location - 239 Sime Road (Company transport at Caldecott MRT)


www.keppelclub.com.sg
hiringCompany.name: Keppel Club, The
